user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sara Payne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbRYiIDU7U4xUuv5K8nsYJMU5mnGB4l2YsQ_kPS7aQlWMeEV_fCA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fun rides and amazing good. Of course the wait lines are incredibly long especially on the weekend. No point in going if you dont have lightning lane passes, but even so, its eventful with tons to see and even more to eat and drink.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtdbFEVYrzwq32iu3JVqe-&fid=0x0:0x6a8fdc07e900c261"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Tariq Alhammouri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsavcPvI1I2sfPRCDQuVX4Fz83SZ5hhVqEQXbLJwgdxoXsyoH8GA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"MAGIC PERFECTED! Best trip ever. ✨

Absolutely the best vacation. Disney World is spotless from top to bottom—even the washrooms are always clean and well-maintained, which you really appreciate after a long day!

The food has evolved so much. Way beyond basic park food—we had incredible meals, from quick-service burgers to fancy steaks. Everything was delicious.

But the real game changer was the Lightning Lane. Worth every penny! We walked onto the most popular rides (rode Tron twice!), saved hours of waiting, and used that time to relax and eat snacks instead. It maximizes your day and eliminates the stress.
So can't wait to come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDcHY2AAq3zD695C9nwbork&fid=0x0:0x6a8fdc07e900c261"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Chris Robertson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX62BSyMJKxOgnooaaor8TdS7Be7KHGi-EaDTbcv6mBbbu4ioga7w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Disney California Adventure Park is one of the most entertaining theme parks in Southern California and a great complement to Disneyland Park. The park blends classic Disney storytelling with California-inspired themes, incredible rides, and some of the best food inside any Disney park.

The highlight for many visitors is Radiator Springs Racers in Cars Land. The level of detail in that area is amazing, especially at night when the neon lights turn on and the whole land feels like you stepped into the Cars movie. Another favorite is Guardians of the Galaxy – Mission: BREAKOUT!, which is fast, funny, and one of the most exciting rides in the park.

The park is also great just to walk around. Pixar Pier, Avengers Campus, and the waterfront views near Paradise Bay make it easy to spend an entire day exploring. There are plenty of places to grab food, relax, and watch live entertainment. Between the rides, the theming, and the atmosphere, Disney California Adventure delivers a full day of fun for families, couples, and Disney fans.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAP-PWm89A_hRt0J5jmf0h9&fid=0x0:0x6a8fdc07e900c261"],"When":"2026-3-6"},{"Name":"Valerie Velazquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtvGkTVV5tcC_bAzOUvwe5uQkJlDy4shZwj5H7cKMaB05bTG09dw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"First time at California adventure it was so much fun, bought my tickets online.. no wait to get in,  not sp packed for a Monday the most wait in line for a ride maybe 40 minutes if that. Food was ok but the atmosphere 10 out of 10 .. would definitely go again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzMTa_MUY9XNqMd7QzoofG&fid=0x0:0x6a8fdc07e900c261"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"Veronica Hui-Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbct_9N9AIUtJHYAJqE5Edhu6gQtHT6pfSgEqfr5U_gC1_0Du4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommended!!
Very fun park across from Disneyland theme park. There are Hollywood Land, Avengers Campus, Cars Land, Pixar Pier, San Fransokyo Square and Paradise Gardens Park. The best rides in Cars Land are Radiator Springs Racers and Mater's Junkyard Jamboree!  A lot of the rides in Paradise Gardens Park are enjoyable for all ages and the boardwalk is great for chilling by the water and for the nighttime water & light show. Lots of good food in the San Fransokyo Square. The Mickey Mouse shaped and Baymax shaped sourdough breads are from there!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0tCWXn9iTMkW7CYQX3mtu&fid=0x0:0x6a8fdc07e900c261"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Arti Pandey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYylq6g6PwYsvQF-0B4eh1qVLZIQsEfWmlBOLF8dLf0MeG60bJ3w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An amazing experience visiting Disney California Adventure park for the day. We went on a rainy day which was nice for shorter lines! We did not do the park hopper pass, but we did get the lightning pass and that was super helpful to be able to do more rides in a day. The food options were great, the rides were very fun and the world of color water show was amazing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDimkjGjYCnGlCgJVh3BSD3&fid=0x0:0x6a8fdc07e900c261"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Bob Chepalonis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIp7ZY2BmSQdb8UptI1exQKoosq5bIkERHEELO8RTYt2vkBgg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visiting Disney California Adventure Park in the morning with a hopper pass was a great strategy. From 8:00 to 11:00 a.m., we were able to accomplish a lot before moving to the other park. Being the smaller park, it’s easy to cover more ground quickly, with a solid mix of thrill rides, attractions, and great food options. The availability of single rider lanes really helps cut down wait times, allowing you to experience more rides in a shorter period. Having Lightning Lane access is also a big advantage—you can effectively combine Lightning Lane selections with single rider options and move through multiple attractions efficiently. The Ferris wheel stands out as truly unique, especially with its swinging gondolas, making this park an excellent way to start the day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpDgt7ymyLiAvak6UbDpCO&fid=0x0:0x6a8fdc07e900c261"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Preeti K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMru5ct05cfpaj64LkZZ0aHSILCB4i4soomjSdBWzmUOrMJN9B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Disney California Adventure is such a fun and energetic park, especially if you enjoy exploring and a bit of adventure 🎡🌴 The park feels vibrant and lively the moment you walk in. Even though my family and I arrived a little late and only managed to go on a few rides, we still had an amazing time together.

Since my last visit, I noticed several new updates and changes, which made the experience feel fresh ✨ Cars Land was especially fun and full of energy 🚗💨 The atmosphere there alone makes it worth the visit. If I had more time, I would’ve loved to explore more rides and attractions.

Overall, it was a great experience and a fun way to spend time with family 🥰🎢 I’m already looking forward to coming back again and spending more time enjoying everything the park has to offer 🌟","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDxPY_8bSNzp7a2gUNKbqvB&fid=0x0:0x6a8fdc07e900c261"],"When":"2026-2-4"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Joseph Haro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGEjTxNPxHIA2KQkAjaXsCxh3goSmvlRniLOq23liOPR5Tt9titg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Shot out to Hooks, the security guard holding down the fort and keeping people in line. I got a pbnj burger from the Kroft it was ok the pbnj took away a lot of the flavor from the burger. Then I got a mango Pop n Boba which was very refreshing and flavorful great service and very friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYws5pftwFw0EIJl4UzPUp&fid=0x0:0x55df51788c1c1f2c"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"David Won","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXhoOyjCD8YfC59NY2YbLNpuL0w4iKuCGyaWRNCBcm4ySHhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to visit with friends and family. Bustling vibe and a lot of great food options. Good mix of restaurants, drinks and desserts. There is a nice open area across from the building where we let the kids run around after dinner.

Parking can be challenging during busy times so we often park a couple blocks away in the neighborhood. Sometimes we get lucky and get street parking right next to the building.

There is a lot of communal seating both upstairs and downstairs but best for parties of 4 or less. Bigger tables are downstairs. They have a couple bench swings and large cushioned benches if you just need a seat. We had a large party (13) and was able to sit outside on the front patio, which had large tables (probably empty because no alcohol is allowed outside). Can be a bit loud as the front patio overlooks the parking lot.

Food options are great. We had soul food, smash burgers, ramen, Indian and beers from various restaurants. Most of the resultants have dedicated seating but we like to get food from various places when we visit (some places give you a pager, others will text or call your cell when food is ready). user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Elizabeth Allen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5-SHztzRf5UyTf0acZvBZ8HUao60jFtk6UTQbU9TdCHRMog=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stopped in one morning and picked up a chocolate almond croissant on my way to work — what a treat! The first few bites were perfection: light, flaky, and crisp on the outside with a soft, delicate center. The sweetness level was just right too. Toward the middle, the filling was a little rich for one person, so it might actually be perfect for sharing.

Still, the quality and flavor were excellent, and I can’t wait to return to try more of their pastries.

A special shoutout to Cesar, who was so kind and attentive. He made sure my croissant was carefully packed instead of just tossed in, which I really appreciated.

A wonderful spot with great service and pastries that feel freshly made with care!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk9H6214Ly5vBJ4jFVyfnI&fid=0x0:0x720b237564d507da"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Kiki Boniki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9tZGoVdl5_SVRwWjfy4Y8CZU1teICW7Dp5Ih-bAQchKr47HNN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has such beautiful desserts and pastries.   The staff are always so nice and helpful.   They have great gelatto flavors.   My favorite is Ube Caramel.   So good!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erika Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6BFmhGv-SG1csK7lvfccEuSEamy2f7078hU07Rq4-QvCkig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ordered a crepe, avocado toast line, Nutellachiato, and a latte. Service was great friendly and helpful.  Was surprised on the toast flights they were pretty big slices.  This dish was more of a sharable dish. The taste was unique for each toast but was pretty good. The favorite pf the order was the Nutellachiato very delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_57aBtwE&fid=0x0:0x720b237564d507da"],"When":"2025-1-19"},{"Name":"tiffany","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNDAOeQd7aytDNSwLFj4x8n-xvB_-kXbiYUUyXlR63jR8vPM8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute, little French pastry shop. I ordered the Yuzu and Lemon Tart, the Le Mille Feuille, and a decadent chocolate slice. The lemon tart, WOW! Now that’s how a lemon tart should taste, perfectly tart with the subtle hint of sweetness of the cream. The Le Mille Feuille was also quite exquisite with a dreamy vanilla bean cream. Pricey but well worth the amazing taste! Will be back to try some other pastries later.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApaN4Fz-nLHnRb1NoL2P8w&fid=0x0:0x720b237564d507da"],"When":"2025-6-28"},{"Name":"Rosemari Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzaZWnLoZ34KaOvbPCsyusMqrbM425gvgfodprSNgCbytFwQLm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came for Halloween goodies but they weren't in season yet. Ended up getting a strawberry garnished fruit tart. It was so smooth and delicious! Each strawberry had a nice sweetness and the tart had a great texture. I'll definitely come back soon to try more sweets.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZvbyqeg&fid=0x0:0x720b237564d507da"],"When":"2023-10-7"},{"Name":"Millena P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVah1vphLTCG2y_FdpJx-3HgrLnHIsO11-urL0k0emkCDiReG1v=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Stopped by here after a night at Villains Brewery for something sweet.

Parking: This spot is located inside the Anaheim Packing District. If you plan on driving, don't do it. Get dropped off. Finding a parking spot is a nightmare.

Ambiance/Environment: They're located in the right corner once you enter the packing house. There's a display of all their desserts and pastries. They also have their own small seating area inside.

Service: There were two workers, and they were simply quick & efficient.

Desserts & drinks: I ordered the Tres Leches Latte and a Tuxedo cake slice (I forgot the exact name, but it was the last piece of cake that night). The Tres Leches Latte was sweet and tasted exactly as it sounds. The tuxedo cake slice perfectly satisfied my sweet cravings. The chocolate layers were delicious, and it was surprisingly not too sweet.

Pricing: Prices are definitely more than average. My drink was a little over $8 after taxes, and the cake slice was $13. I'd try their other desserts since I really enjoyed the cake slice. This is the type of spot to treat yourself once in a while.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDxxkBrxzEJcIGGmJ19dBMR&fid=0x0:0x720b237564d507da"],"When":"2025-6-29"},{"Name":"juan v","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-UIWDkmzHxY98VIr-NB5wW26U2AWsTI3NVLRxM3gZMhWWDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I would have given 1 star because the bread pudding was frozen but the person that was there (I don’t know if he was the owner) was nice when I told him about the quality and condition of his food. It was completely frozen but had good flavor. They have good coffee with very good aroma and the other pastries were 8 out of 10, again the pastries didn’t feel fresh and the Nutella cruffin  was really good but has way too much Nutella for my taste. Hope they fix the problem with the food as they reheat their bread.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD1PzrkgE&fid=0x0:0x720b237564d507da"],"When":"2024-4-6"},{"Name":"Sam Hosein","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfE8yeu6dZBn1HA9MPqY_Ope63pKaKRqJ14cvUGGN5JhtJy4oV_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Yummy French bakery. Lots of menu options. They do provide sampling.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATpMKVFWacMufOl4P4-IQ-&fid=0x0:0x720b237564d507da"],"When":"2025-11-20"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Rachel Trauger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUl3mdQd76EZpThFUYj49EQmvM6U6LdsXcO5e_QOanJHoulhXWy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My battery died twice in the last couple of weeks (my fault) and both times California Roadside Service was dispatched through AAA.  They did great work both times but the second time was especially exceptional thanks to the tech, Brent.  He arrived before the ETA, made sure to run testing on my battery due to the prior recent service call to make sure I’d have no trouble going forward, and made sure it was well charged before sending me out to drive around.   Super nice guy and truly seems to care about helping the people he serves. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Sylican","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQU7qICZ4oK7zNhbf42F0JHCsl_9hh8NI8GaG-idTS4tMnBI8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rocky handled my towing needs like a champ! I called AAA for the tow on my 53 F100 and when I hung up he was already behind me within 5min. Highly recommended, they get it done right! Took extreme care in hauling my classic pickup!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ryan Rice","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLkT6oJSRnuUehmEkKQZtss99-i0CXF5Xl04ZgAaU2DkzC0iAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My car battery was dead and I thought it was just because I left a light on or something while I was away. Incredible service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kay Tee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpUrWjS57sBdwWG6IktLbP5hepDfvQVmJ7sYKjtDwtVLi7O4fK-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So my muffler fell off my car tonight on the freeway! After calling AAA they sent amazing technician named Edgar who was nothing but professional and respectful! Not to mention he was prompt in getting us off the freeway safely! One of the best AAA Service I’ve had","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDdlLu2iQE\u0026fid=0x0:0x48b998ecfd1d3b7"],"When":"2024-2-21"},{"Name":"Aro O","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6eDoBB3Lxd0m2Cv7iJov2A0UVnEi5SVHSiE398dHQM8N_qgZ3qw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I locked my keys in my car, I called AAA and they sent California Roadside Service. *Ricardo* responded to the call and arrived within half an hour. He was able to unlock my car within two minutes. He was very nice professional service oriented, and did an outstanding job to open my car door.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQhcfkEA\u0026fid=0x0:0x48b998ecfd1d3b7"],"When":"2025-3-6"},{"Name":"Janette Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuyyA8hqwVZzNZWt6Ic8sGnXVM4WqF04s4DkVOr7vIJknklw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Poor Customer Service. Absolutely rude and wont even give you the time to hear you out. We came here because we were referred by AAA to come here to get help with our car battery and instead getting 5 minutes of there time, they just told us to call the customer service phone number. This is supposedly a AAA location where we could come and get our battery replaced. Everything would have been fine if this guy would have just been friendlier and just be patient to explain the process. He didn't even let us explain why we were there or how we got there. He kept interrupting me when I was explaining my situation. Regardless of how you want to see things, that is not how to treat people. We are a family with our kids who were all in the car trying to get some help and this is how you trat someone in need. Absolutely unnecessary and completely heartless with no consideration. Ignacio is the guy who\nmisrepresented AAA. A formal complaint has already been submitted. He needs to adjust that attitude.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thelma Rosiak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKD0QucHQbQAJBErcawoc_2C-msreitmO7CBSLFMsMRCJ-nQw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Not worth the time and effort to report how bad this company is. Simply, they did not arrive at or close to the given eta. Driver gave Agent false info to make himself look good even stating he did not phone me even when I have his phone number otherwise if he didn't call me how did I have it? Of course Agent didn't side with the customer and I had to cancel the tow not wanting nor trusting this driver and AAA Agent.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kimmia Salgado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW-GEIsZ8-evQBjuWBSYTerb4TFKIg8zkicJZ1pNl3lcxhDfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best AAA experiences! My car was stuck in one of the worst positions and we could not get it into neutral to move it. Francisco went above and beyond to get my car hooked up and delivered to the shop. Wonderful customer service, vehicle care, and mechanical knowledge. He even knew trusted mechanics in the area. You can't go wrong with Francisco.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Gabriel Rivera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpHGM4hAP4ljeUr4Ji9Lzquhm21yuFpMl2jcsH_j0vAEI2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great desserts spent 36$ and got 3 pastries 1 mango 1 strawberry and 1 peach cobbler thing.  All of it was delicious  but the cobbler was the best of the 3. The peaches were flavorful and the topping was like a soft crumb and had cream cheese frosting i believe  omg delicious.. 10 out of 10 on the peach one.  The other 2 were mid 5 out of 10. Def try the peach cobbler thing though..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFL1J9GErEt_puuDahih8w&fid=0x0:0xa554ad7a27d8694c"],"When":"2026-3-7"},{"Name":"Sandatta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqF6K8cB9HHmJrKlFwCtX-pmSnPlg3Ep3z920ZrIziLMxZxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This place was insanely disappointing… I was so excited to try their pastries because I finally found a place with the fruit desserts closer than LA, instead, I was met with distaste. I was thrilled to finally try the mochi dubai chocolate but I was immediately grossed out right when I bit into it. At first, I was confused as to why it has a harder shell around it but let it slide because I thought it was a chocolate shell but NOPE!! it was dried out/hardened mochi dough… On top of that, the kataifi was sort of undercooked and there was barely any pistachio cream, it was just overall disgusting (for clarification, we bought 2 and I had to throw the one i bit into away because it was nasty. The picture shown is the 2nd one but sliced in half to show how there’s barely any pistachio filling). The fruit pastries however were not that bad but I wouldn’t want to order them again. This is a non-issue but I could tell they used the fibrous red mangoes because I was pulling out fibers out of my mouth but I’m not showing that because that’s gross. To top it all off, everything was overpriced, $14 for the fruit pastries is ridiculous, I also showed how small they were for $14. I would get a refund if I could. You’re better off making the drive to LA for the pastries instead, worth the price with better ingredients.

Note: I am always willing to pay any price for good food","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKok2ljX07PSVIEHztlpxQ&fid=0x0:0xa554ad7a27d8694c"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Joana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXz5bBVYX9ha1YlUwH90Si_Izsymijmg7A5voQHIkNTJqUPq1xu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Decided to try this place a little closer to home for the viral pastries and unfortunately we will
Not be coming back. Both pastries were frozen almost solid… flavors were very bland and overall the customer service was very mediocre. Pastries were $14 Each which I thought was very over priced for the tiny size of them. The tiramisu was ok nothing special.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_Mne9cGwqtpF4bn0RDu33&fid=0x0:0xa554ad7a27d8694c"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Megan Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYyW9CmLrbe2jBDmgYuuymIsl3v-U5m_MUBXbwrAo9OboY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love the desserts here! The strawberry mousse is delicious—it is light, fluffy, and not too sweet. The mango mousse is also pretty good but the strawberry is the best. The mango mousse has a whole mango slice in it and the strawberry has a strawberry compote.

I’ve also tried the brownie—unlike a typical American brownie, it is very dense and almost ganache like rather than cakey. It was decadent and delicious. My friend and I split a banana pudding, which was light and refreshing, and great for a hot day. And the carrot cake is great too! No raisins in it, which is nice. I wouldn’t mind more carrot in it.

The presentation of all the desserts is beautiful and the shop is well lit and cozy. Service is always friendly. For anyone complaining about the price—these are handmade specialty desserts. You’re paying for the quality and novelty. If you’re cheap, don’t blame the shop.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jamee Ryan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbr5lGMt5tOLiKCVL0Q-VzvKJ126v7KWqjeL_7cktcv5WLHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went to SDL yesterday and everything was amazing . We especially enjoyed the banana pudding .the crème brûlée was great , it had more of a buttery flavor vs vanilla  bean . Got the viral strawberry cake and it was great . My daughter was surprised by a stuffed animal from one the of girls who worked there and it made her day! Very clean and lovely shop .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruchika Gupta-Realtor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9IhnVl6KbfsKAuEWrcXD9CrP0ocn-vX4xjZP84ClkUCS8zhTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Came here craving something sweet. What can I say… I do have a sweet tooth 😆. Anyways a small shop, excellent service though. Their selection varied from Dubai chocolate to tiramisu, cheesecakes and macarons. Did have tea and boba on the menu as well. We tried peach crumble and different flavor macarons. Crumble was good and macarons were okay.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJvPYQFtp7f1dQDu-gbFp5&fid=0x0:0xa554ad7a27d8694c"],"When":"2025-8-21"},{"Name":"Jeanette B. Salvador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUa3uebFNekZYkwJK3NzyXzZcV0fBA6VmZg7cQFUNVgkQqMrdnPRA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"8.29.24.  Stopped in for a quick visit after I fueled up my car.  This place is right next door to the Arco gas station.
A nice cute place.  Friendly staff member and delicious sweets to fill your eyes and tummy.
I didn't want to over do it, I will have to return to try other items.  For today's visit I got the biscoff cookie butter cookie, a Raspberry strudel and a peach/ black tea ice tea.
All were nice and delicious.  The tea was not too sweet,  I love that.
The strudel and cookie did not let me down. Just smelling the cookie I knew it would be super delicious, and it was!
I'm definitely coming back to bring some friends to try out these treats.
They do have the Dubai chocolate bar and pistachio knafeh cookie but I can't get those since it has Tahini and I'm allergic to that.
Nonetheless, this place is cute and great to satisfy your sweet tooth after lunch or dinner.  Hope you try them out.  Support small businesses because they support the community. Click if you like this review.  Thanks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7j9Gw9AE&fid=0x0:0xa554ad7a27d8694c"],"When":"2024-8-29"},{"Name":"Rebecca LeFager","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeD9_H4v_6MRGsO8QJjewWqlH4iW3IorwoZ_YxNssDAo9ykQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The owners of this delicious dessert lounge are so kind and friendly. They make the best pistachio knafeh bar anywhere we’ve ever had!  I highly recommend anyone that loves desserts to go there!","Images":null,"When":""}]

When my wife and I showed up to take a tour, we had come from several other warehouses like this.  We were immediately greeted by Brian and he was the first person who seems to truly care about the design we were trying to accomplish, asking us questions about our current space, what colors we had, and what we were looking for.  He knew his stuff and worked with our budget.  When his team came out, Franco was professional and on time.  The items were in great condition.  The team took the time to put everything together and then clean everything before leaving.  Very happy and I will be using you guys again.  Thank you from everyone here at Ceemi Agency!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hoyt Douglas Battles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJpJ8CBOkPsC-cLCyZZpdvl8UbuxB_3Ro3K6sbUBrkrtF0gRL9Wg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I hardly believe that review posted claiming that it took a month to get a desk, I became concerned because one should not carelessly post reviews that do not tell the whole story. the fact is California Office Interiors is like a well oiled machine, there are many coordinated employees. my crew that had the opportunity to conduct business were treated with kindness and respect and certainly with efficiency,  So I'm thoroughly confused as to why ONE desk could be a problem. was it the presidential resolute desk from the white house? hardly, I Just want anyone and everyone else to know that should you have the opportunity to shop with California Office Interiors and their affiliates,  you will be greeted with genuine interest and kindness, they do not act pushy,  because their products basically sell themselves. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Chris Markarian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvdMMppJy-FgJAaTMd8Zo5TDr7tv8s51jYQkDjpA4y14FacA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After a long search for a reliable company to do our dream kitchen, we ended up with CA Kitchen floors and baths.
Not only we got our dream kitchen exactly the way we wanted it, we saved over 40 thousand dollars too.
The owner of the company made sure the work was done right and he visited to inspect the work regularly.
We couldn’t be any happier with our choice and look forward to having them come back and do more work for us in the future.
I highly recommend you shop around and then go to CA KItchen to see the difference in price, service and quality.
Thank you so much guys and keep up the great work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbiqLwpwE&fid=0x0:0x53ac9d9b76ec1a18"],"When":"2024-7-25"},{"Name":"Linda Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYEEpl9eotxyePGWxzzZ6zvSJy_gCY4aFjCa-voXtkg_ZNK0Wqcw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went to Ca Kitchens. The owner greeted me.  I felt very comfortable the second I walked in. Her daughter was there helping her. It was good to know they are family owned and operated. I am so happy I met them. Price was very competitive and they finished on time. Everyone was nice and really easy to work with. I had a great experience. I would recommend them to my friends and family.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDvwsDCGA&fid=0x0:0x53ac9d9b76ec1a18"],"When":"2024-12-18"},{"Name":"Mark Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXshGddxRkHuG4Q5CP4yoz3l7pxDDtD1Pr33bWZXCvGYGVbGJ-GfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Over the last two years we have hired Elias and his crew to remodel two bathrooms in our home, and we just finished a third smaller project with him this week. All were wonderful experiences with excellent results. We worked with him from design to the finished product. This is an honest company that provides an excellent product at a fair price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC11NDAXQ&fid=0x0:0x53ac9d9b76ec1a18"],"When":"2023-12-23"},{"Name":"Lana Chernobrovina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0Toq-xlNaAVQ9d6vhlIWsF_GXKEAGhIa4gjkyfmsXlGnoHvE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a very hard decision to choose the right company for our kitchen project. I spoke with many others, but only Elies stood out — absolutely honest, friendly, and not playing games. I consider myself an easygoing client, and sometimes people take advantage of that, but this time it was different.

The kitchen looks amazing, everything fit within our budget, and most importantly, the company was willing to give us choices and provide more options for their clients. That made all the difference.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeff Nelson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjhU3zOeDLxqmDC4wNBOwdEWfScinH_jCLB8RytZ5Yroc7CQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"CA Kitchens did a complete kitchen remodel for me. New beautiful white shaker cabinets, along with quartz countertops and gorgeous backsplash. We enlarged my existing island which makes it much more useful. It is not often you have a great experience with a building contractor, but I did with Elias and CA Kitchens. they performed as promised, and did the project for a great price. I'm very happy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzi_KKgwE&fid=0x0:0x53ac9d9b76ec1a18"],"When":"2024-6-5"},{"Name":"Bandaly Azzam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpqU6nUYYt2y0bRS_nZ3Co4I5Der1Wi2VTOquKaTi6A5dfnkNrkg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our wonderful experience with CA Kitchens. My wife and I started this journey of a major kitchen remodel last year around June when we started to contact contractor after contractor. We had a general design in mind and a set look and feel. When CA Kitchen stopped by for a look, we showed our general sketch, few model pics, and inspiration. Every contractor before and after that said ok; no suggestions no real comments. When it came to CA Kitchen, they started suggesting some really good concepts that I have never thought of. One was relocating the fridge to the other side of the kitchen to get 11ft countertop rather than breaking it with the fridge. That idea never came to us but it made so much sense and made use of every Ince of space. This incident wasn’t isolated but what I really appreciated right out of the bat, was that they felt like a partner in the design using years of experience to take our ideas to the next level.

We visited CA Kitchens after that to go over the sketch, and look at material. We weren’t 100% ready to pull the trigger thought the sketch-up was exactly what we wanted and price was comparable. Owner noticed we were hesitant and didn’t push to sign or make a decision. He recommended we call a few more contractors and keep that process going until we are ready. That level of confidence and appreciation to our comfort level wasn’t re-expereinced by any other contractor. The rest were generally incredibly pushy to sign right then and there; we also used what we learned from CA Kitchen as the base design for the rest. Sure enough we felt the other 5 or 6 lacked the experience, we dealt with sales people and not experienced designers. A couple months passed we were ready to pull the trigger, with a caveat we wanted to blow out a wall and expand on the design CA kitchen came out with. We called setup another in-house meeting to talk about the wall blowout, the custom subzero fridge cabinet that will be flanked by two navy cabinets across the main. CA Kitchen then modeled nailed the changes. They said they want an engineer out to make sure the load bearing wall that the safety of the family was their number one concern. We signed that night.

Since then anytime CA Kitchen said they were going to come out to work on the project; they were there early and on time. IF anyone worked with contractors you know that is a rarity. Engineer came out ran measurements, every professional they brought were on top of their game. Best Drywaller I have seen and we have a flat no textured wall (very evident if done wrong). The team had an eye for detail, and any issues that arose was dealt with and managed. I will post the pics of where we are at now. Appliances will be installed later in the week. Once the fridge comes, CA Kitchen will add the custom cabinets and will provide additional pictures. Anyone looking for a teammate in the process, who appreciates safety with the build, quality, timely commitment, and contractor who will bring every inch of expertise to design the kitchen of your dream do not look any further.

Included a few pics of the journey the before/during/after(almost complete) Will add more as we complete.

*Update*
Officially complete and couldn’t be happier","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICWot3M7wE&fid=0x0:0x53ac9d9b76ec1a18"],"When":"2022-2-22"},{"Name":"Marcus Dayhoff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCYVHzn1RYMvxmmGlkZ-OldndvZAMCC4xYElYSLH3AgdgusA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5 Stars From Start to Finish!
CA Kitchens Floors & Baths is, without question, the best family-owned home renovation company in Southern California. Over the years, I have hired many contractors, including those from Costco and Home Depot, expecting better-vetted quality but often ending up disappointed.

I initially hired CA Kitchens to remodel my master bathroom to test their work and am now moving forward with remodeling our kitchen. From the very moment we visited the showroom, we were greeted with professionalism and kindness by the owner, Elias, his wife, and his sales team. We were extremely impressed with the high-quality contemporary material samples, and they quoted us a very good price for both labor and materials, staying within our budget.
The agreement process was straightforward, and they paid close attention to all the details we discussed before starting the job. Throughout the process, I felt that the owner and each member of their team took great pride in their work.
No one likes to have their family life disrupted by strangers and ongoing work, but this team understands that and goes out of their way to minimize disruptions. While at our home, the workers were always courteous, respectful, and professional. Even after we requested several changes to our original plans, the job was completed on time, and we were delivered an amazing new bathroom as promised!
As a professional psychologist with a good sense of character judgment, I have counseled many who have made promises to change, but failed to follow through. And I especially appreciated working with Elias and his wife who truly "walk the talk." Throughout the entire process, they were always accessible, managed their workers and work efficiently, made onsite inspections to review progress, and ensured we were satisfied. They reiterated that their primary goal is to do the job right. I believe them to be driven by faith, integrity, honesty, and principle, and this was evident throughout the project.
My positive impression was further validated by a city inspector who, while reviewing the work and permit, mentioned that in his experience with Elias and his company across different cities, they consistently do quality work by the book and are highly reputable. More importantly, our bathroom was up to code, looked great to him, and we were good to go!
I highly recommend CA Kitchens Floors & Baths without hesitation and am hiring them to upgrade our kitchen and other projects.
Thank you, Elias and your amazing team for a positive experience and delivering a 5-star performance from start to finish.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLx-r7eQ&fid=0x0:0x53ac9d9b76ec1a18"],"When":"2024-7-1"},{"Name":"Susan Immer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGER4kYnz20el1HvyPi2Ogoh6TZjCyEiaZ4-iE_ZGr6n65pA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ca Kitchen, Floors and Baths remodeled our kitchen including adding a coffee bar and refloored four rooms. Subcontractors were friendly and took pride in their work. They met their completion schedule even though we needed to adjust our availability. They were recommended by friends and I would likewise suggest you call them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDmvazN4wE&fid=0x0:0x53ac9d9b76ec1a18"],"When":"2022-2-6"}]

I was shocked when none of them responded. It was so awkward that I immediately turned around and left. I knew immediately that this was not the place where I needed to find fellowship for my sobriety. I was really sad. I am a very friendly person and I go out of my way to try to make others feel comfortable. If anybody bothers to read this review, I would simply encourage the individuals who attend this meeting to do a better job and to make a better effort to make newcomers welcome.
